jobs.title: PIZZA SHIFT
jobs.instructions: Tap [TIP] buttons around your car before they vanish. Tips range from $0.50 to $4.

jobs.title: BURGER FLIP
jobs.instructions: Slide the bar into the pass zone and hit [FLIP] for a bonus tip. Sizzle picks up when you nail it.

jobs.title: MANAGER
jobs.instructions: Oversee the floor. Rare meeting bonuses pop up — tap to collect.

jobs.title: DAY TRADER
jobs.instructions: Buy or sell on the ticker. Fast calls earn volatile bonuses.

jobs.title: CEO
jobs.instructions: Mostly passive income. Tap golf invites and board meetings when they appear.
